description_long: This warehouse is a rectangular, single-story brick building with a gabled metal roof. The facade features three evenly spaced white-framed windows on each long side, providing natural light to the interior. The short ends of the building each have a single entryway: one side with a plain door and the other with a solid brick wall. The structure sits on a circular patch of grass and dirt, suggesting it is freestanding and not attached to other buildings. The roof is made of corrugated metal, slightly weathered, and overhangs the walls for added protection. The overall design is simple and utilitarian, with no visible signage or decorative elements.
description: A rectangular brick warehouse with a gabled metal roof, white-framed windows, and a single entry door on one end. The design is simple and utilitarian, with a weathered appearance.
description_view_0: The end of the warehouse with a solid brick wall and no visible entry or windows is shown.
description_view_1: The long side of the warehouse is visible, featuring three white-framed windows evenly spaced along the brick wall.
description_view_2: The opposite end of the warehouse is shown, featuring a single entry door centered in the brick wall.
description_view_3: The other long side of the warehouse is visible, also with three white-framed windows matching the opposite side.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade is constructed of red brick with three evenly spaced, white-framed rectangular windows. The entryway is a simple, unadorned door, and there are no visible decorative or functional embellishments.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is a simple gabled structure made of corrugated metal, with a slight overhang on all sides and no visible skylights or rooftop equipment.
